summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MarketPhaseEngine component integration. The new unified component successfully combines Phase Performance Heatmap and Horizon Stack functionality with simplified, user-friendly data presentation. All requirements verified: clean data display, API integration, old component removal, and proper visual design.
passed_tests: MarketPhaseEngine component renders correctly on Fractal page
Historical Phase Performance table shows 6 phases (Phase, Historical Success %, Avg Return %, Risk levels)
Current Forecast Weighting displays horizons with colored progress bars and percentages
Phase data loaded correctly: MARKUP (53%, +3.6%, Medium), MARKDOWN (60%, +0.9%, Medium), etc.
Forecast weighting bars show proper colors and percentages (180D: 40%, 365D: 40%, 30D: 28%)
Technical junk successfully removed (no Sharpe, Score, Samples, Grade, Filter terms found)
Old PhaseHeatmap and HorizonStackView components fully replaced
Clean data presentation with only user-friendly terms: Historical Success, Avg Return, Risk, Influence on Forecast
Risk levels properly categorized as Low/Medium/High based on performance metrics
Colored phase badges match chart colors (MARKUP: blue, MARKDOWN: pink, RECOVERY: cyan, etc.)
Component loads data without errors or loading states
Visual design matches requirements with proper spacing and typography
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (13/13 features working)
